'''Subject 4D668493X''' was a [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] predator created by a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] contractor. Allegedly, it was a specimen from a program dedicated to create a creature that could aid [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] in their efforts to track down and apprehend criminals. Pale-skinned, it possessed sharp teeth, claws, and a whip-like tail, as well as capable night vision and a strong sense of smell. A [[Disruptor/Legends|disintegration]]-only [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] was placed upon the creature after it escaped from the laboratory in which it was being held.<ref name="Bounties to Die For" />

The posted bounty portrayed Subject 4D668493X as a simple lab animal that happened to slip out at an opportune moment, killing several men before fleeing. However, it displayed significant intelligence in escaping a high-security facility and stowing away unnoticed in a soon-to-depart ship. Additionally, despite being described as "bloodthirsty," the creature remained patiently in said ship's cargo hold until it reached [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] rather than attack the unsuspecting crew. Subject 4D668493X was even knowledgeable enough to be able to read and write [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and [[Binary/Legends|Binary]], as well as wield [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="Bounties to Die For" />
